ground_truth.title: IMDb Top 250 movies
ground_truth.main_content:
#1 The Shawshank Redemption 1994 2h 22m R 9.3 (3.2M)
#2 The Godfather 1972 2h 55m R 9.2 (2.2M)
#3 The Dark Knight 2008 2h 32m PG-13 9.1 (3.1M)
#4 The Godfather Part II 1974 3h 22m R 9.0 (1.5M)
#5 12 Angry Men 1957 1h 36m Approved 9.0 (976K)
#6 The Lord of the Rings: The Return of the King 2003 3h 21m PG-13 9.0 (2.2M)
#7 Schindler's List 1993 3h 15m R 9.0 (1.6M)
#8 The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring 2001 2h 58m PG-13 8.9 (2.2M)
#9 Pulp Fiction 1994 2h 34m R 8.8 (2.4M)
#10 The Good, the Bad and the Ugly 1966 2h 58m R 8.8 (887K)
#11 The Lord of the Rings: The Two Towers 2002 2h 59m PG-13 8.8 (1.9M)
#12 Forrest Gump 1994 2h 22m PG-13 8.8 (2.5M)
#13 Fight Club 1999 2h 19m R 8.8 (2.6M)
#14 Inception 2010 2h 28m PG-13 8.8 (2.8M)
#15 Star Wars: Episode V - The Empire Strikes Back 1980 2h 4m PG 8.7 (1.5M)
#16 The Matrix 1999 2h 16m R 8.7 (2.2M)
#17 Goodfellas 1990 2h 25m R 8.7 (1.4M)
#18 Interstellar 2014 2h 49m PG-13 8.7 (2.5M)
#19 One Flew Over the Cuckoo's Nest 1975 2h 13m R 8.6 (1.2M)
#20 Se7en 1995 2h 7m R 8.6 (2M)
#21 It's a Wonderful Life 1946 2h 10m PG 8.6 (552K)
#22 The Silence of the Lambs 1991 1h 58m R 8.6 (1.7M)
#23 Seven Samurai 1954 3h 27m Not Rated 8.6 (400K)
#24 Saving Private Ryan 1998 2h 49m R 8.6 (1.6M)
#25 The Green Mile 1999 3h 9m R 8.6 (1.6M)

The top rated movie list only includes feature films.
- Shorts, TV movies, and documentaries are not included
- The list is ranked by a formula which includes the number of ratings each movie received from users, and value of ratings received from regular users
- To be included on the list, a movie must receive ratings from at least 25000 users
